MOTD.txt.content:
<blue>Join us every Friday and Saturday for the Sarco dance-off competition.</>
<small>Winners get 100 marks and a Dance Master role on our Discord server!</>

Thanks and have fun!

Rules.txt.info: Rules to be displayed on Join
Rules.txt.content:
<title>{gameserver.list_name} Server Rules</>
<red>1 - Please only attack Camptos.</>
Camptosauruses are very evil!

<orange>2 - Corpse Cove is closed due to dirty water.</>

These are the only rules on this server!
<large>Thanks, and have fun!</>

Commands.ini.info: You must edit the Commands.ini to modify player roles

GameUserSettings.ini.info: This is almost exclusively used for your Mod List and some hardware-level settings.
GameUserSettings.ini.content:
[PathOfTitans.Mods]

; Add one EnabledMods line per mod when needed:
; EnabledMods="UGC_M_EXAMPLEMODID_SK"

whitelist.txt.info: Path of Titans whitelist. Add one Alderon ID per line when whitelist enforcement is enabled.

auth_token.name: 01 Required - Alderon Auth Token
auth_token.info: Required. Alderon Games auth token used by AlderonGamesCmd to install and update Path of Titans server files.

server_guid.name: 01 Required - Server GUID
server_guid.info: Unique UUIDv4 for this Path of Titans server. Keep {helper.uuid} unless you need a fixed identity across rebuilds.

database.name: 01 Required - Database Mode
database.info: Passed to Captain Gecko pot-server as DATABASE. Use Remote for most community servers; Local is only for local database setups.

branch.name: 01 Required - Branch
branch.info: Path of Titans branch key. Usually production.

launch_params.name: 01 Required - Extra Launch Arguments
launch_params.info: Passed through Captain Gecko pot-server EXTRA_ARGS. Default wires Source Query and Source RCON ports/IPs to GSA. Leave unchanged unless troubleshooting.

map.name: 02 Identity - Map
map.info: Path of Titans internal map name. Use Island for Gondwa, Panjura for Panjura, Riparia for Riparia, or the exact modded map name.

server_password.name: 02 Identity - Server Password
server_password.info: Optional join password. Leave blank for public access.

reserved_slots.name: 02 Identity - Reserved/Admin Slots
reserved_slots.info: Number of slots reserved exclusively for admins or reserved-slot roles.

server_discord_invite_code.name: 02 Identity - Discord Invite Code
server_discord_invite_code.info: Create a permanent Discord invite and paste only the generated code, not the full invite URL.

server_admin_agid_a.name: 02 Identity - Server Admin Alderon ID A
server_admin_agid_a.info: Optional ServerAdmins example slot. Uncomment the ServerAdmins line in Game.ini after filling this.

server_admin_agid_b.name: 02 Identity - Server Admin Alderon ID B
server_admin_agid_b.info: Optional second ServerAdmins example slot. Uncomment the ServerAdmins line in Game.ini after filling this.

paid_users_only.name: 03 Access - Paid Users Only
paid_users_only.info: Restrict the server to paid users only.

enforce_whitelist.name: 03 Access - Enforce Whitelist
enforce_whitelist.info: Require players to be listed in whitelist.txt before joining.

allow_chat.name: 03 Access - Allow Chat
allow_chat.info: Enable or disable text chat for the entire server.

allow_global_chat.name: 03 Access - Global Chat
allow_global_chat.info: Enable or disable the global chat channel.

show_name_tags.name: 03 Access - Player Name Tags
show_name_tags.info: Allow all players to see player name tags. Defaults off for a more survival-focused server.

allow_map.name: 03 Access - Full Map
allow_map.info: Enable or disable the full map.

allow_three_d_map_markers.name: 03 Access - 3D Map Markers
allow_three_d_map_markers.info: Enable or disable markers on the full map and floating quest markers.

server_auto_restart.name: 04 Time & Restart - Path of Titans Auto Restart
server_auto_restart.info: Path of Titans internal auto-restart toggle. Leave disabled when GSA handles scheduled restarts and container recovery.

server_starting_time.name: 04 Time & Restart - World Time On Startup
server_starting_time.info: Time of day after restart, scaled 0-2400. Example: 1350.

dynamic_time_of_day.name: 04 Time & Restart - Dynamic Time of Day
dynamic_time_of_day.info: 1 enables animated day/night cycle. 0 uses fixed ServerStartingTime.

server_day_length.name: 04 Time & Restart - Day Length Minutes
server_day_length.info: Length in minutes of the daylight cycle.

server_night_length.name: 04 Time & Restart - Night Length Minutes
server_night_length.info: Length in minutes of the night cycle.

weather_length_min.name: 04 Time & Restart - Weather Length Min
weather_length_min.info: Minimum minutes a weather type can stay active.

weather_length_max.name: 04 Time & Restart - Weather Length Max
weather_length_max.info: Maximum minutes a weather type can stay active.

weather_blend_min.name: 04 Time & Restart - Weather Blend Min
weather_blend_min.info: Minimum minutes for weather transition blending.

weather_blend_max.name: 04 Time & Restart - Weather Blend Max
weather_blend_max.info: Maximum minutes for weather transition blending.

max_group_size.name: 05 Groups - Maximum Group Size
max_group_size.info: Maximum number of group slots allowed for player groups.

restrict_carnivore_grouping.name: 05 Groups - Restrict Carnivore Grouping
restrict_carnivore_grouping.info: Prevent mixed carnivore grouping when enabled.

restrict_herbivore_grouping.name: 05 Groups - Restrict Herbivore Grouping
restrict_herbivore_grouping.info: Prevent mixed herbivore grouping when enabled.

combat_timer_applies_to_group.name: 05 Groups - Combat Timer Applies To Group
combat_timer_applies_to_group.info: When enabled, combat timers apply to the whole group.

server_growth.name: 06 Growth & Death - Enable Growth
server_growth.info: Enable dinosaur growth. Disabling spawns characters as adults.

passive_growth_per_minute.name: 06 Growth & Death - Passive Growth Per Minute
passive_growth_per_minute.info: Additional passive growth per minute. 0 disables passive growth.

quest_growth_multiplier.name: 06 Growth & Death - Quest Growth Multiplier
quest_growth_multiplier.info: Multiplier for growth earned from quests.

quest_marks_multiplier.name: 06 Growth & Death - Quest Marks Multiplier
quest_marks_multiplier.info: Multiplier for marks earned from quests.

override_local_quest_cooldown.name: 06 Growth & Death - Override Local Quest Cooldown
override_local_quest_cooldown.info: Enable a custom cooldown for local quests.

local_quest_cooldown.name: 06 Growth & Death - Local Quest Cooldown Seconds
local_quest_cooldown.info: Custom local quest cooldown in seconds. Only applies when the override is enabled.

override_location_quest_cooldown.name: 06 Growth & Death - Override Location Quest Cooldown
override_location_quest_cooldown.info: Enable a custom cooldown for location quests.

location_quest_cooldown.name: 06 Growth & Death - Location Quest Cooldown Seconds
location_quest_cooldown.info: Custom location quest cooldown in seconds. Only applies when the override is enabled.

min_growth_after_death.name: 06 Growth & Death - Minimum Growth After Death
min_growth_after_death.info: Minimum growth a player can be rolled back to after death.

lose_growth_past_growth_stages.name: 06 Growth & Death - Lose Growth Past Growth Stages
lose_growth_past_growth_stages.info: Allows death penalties to roll growth back past stage thresholds.

combat_death_marks_penalty_percent.name: 06 Growth & Death - Combat Death Marks Penalty %
combat_death_marks_penalty_percent.info: Marks penalty percentage for combat deaths.

combat_death_growth_penalty_percent.name: 06 Growth & Death - Combat Death Growth Penalty %
combat_death_growth_penalty_percent.info: Growth penalty percentage for combat deaths.

fall_death_marks_penalty_percent.name: 06 Growth & Death - Fall Death Marks Penalty %
fall_death_marks_penalty_percent.info: Marks penalty percentage for fall deaths.

fall_death_growth_penalty_percent.name: 06 Growth & Death - Fall Death Growth Penalty %
fall_death_growth_penalty_percent.info: Growth penalty percentage for fall deaths.

survival_death_marks_penalty_percent.name: 06 Growth & Death - Survival Death Marks Penalty %
survival_death_marks_penalty_percent.info: Marks penalty percentage for survival deaths.

survival_death_growth_penalty_percent.name: 06 Growth & Death - Survival Death Growth Penalty %
survival_death_growth_penalty_percent.info: Growth penalty percentage for survival deaths.

death_info.name: 06 Growth & Death - Death Info
death_info.info: Show dead-character info when permanent death is enabled.

lose_quests_on_death.name: 06 Growth & Death - Lose Quests On Death

change_subspecies_growth_penalty_percent.name: 06 Growth & Death - Change Subspecies Growth Penalty %
change_subspecies_growth_penalty_percent.info: Growth penalty percentage for changing subspecies.

enable_water_quality_system.name: 07 World & Survival - Water Quality System
enable_water_quality_system.info: Enable or disable the water quality system.

enable_water_regeneration.name: 07 World & Survival - Enable Water Regeneration
enable_water_regeneration.info: Allow water to naturally regenerate over time.

water_regen_update_seconds.name: 07 World & Survival - Water Regen Update Seconds

water_regen_rate_seconds.name: 07 World & Survival - Water Regen Rate Seconds

water_regen_value.name: 07 World & Survival - Water Regen Value
water_regen_value.info: Amount of water regenerated each cycle.

water_rain_regen_increment.name: 07 World & Survival - Water Rain Regen Increment

dead_body_time.name: 07 World & Survival - Dead Body Time
dead_body_time.info: Body cleanup timer. 0 lets bodies persist until fully decayed.

respawn_time.name: 07 World & Survival - Respawn Time Minutes
respawn_time.info: Minutes a player must be alive before /respawn can be used.

footprint_lifetime.name: 07 World & Survival - Footprint Lifetime Seconds
footprint_lifetime.info: Maximum footprint lifetime in seconds. 0 disables footprints.

afk_disconnect_time.name: 07 World & Survival - AFK Disconnect Seconds
afk_disconnect_time.info: Seconds before AFK players are disconnected. 0 disables.

max_client_ping_ms.name: 07 World & Survival - Max Client Ping Ms
max_client_ping_ms.info: Maximum client ping. 0 disables ping enforcement.

max_client_ping_duration.name: 07 World & Survival - Max Client Ping Duration
max_client_ping_duration.info: Duration a player can exceed max ping before action. 0 disables.

max_characters_per_player.name: 07 World & Survival - Max Characters Per Player
max_characters_per_player.info: Maximum characters each player may have.

max_characters_per_species.name: 07 World & Survival - Max Characters Per Species
max_characters_per_species.info: Maximum characters per species per player.

speedhack_detection.name: 07 World & Survival - Speedhack Detection
speedhack_detection.info: Speedhack detection mode. Leave default unless troubleshooting.

speedhack_threshold.name: 07 World & Survival - Speedhack Threshold
speedhack_threshold.info: Speedhack detection threshold. Leave default unless troubleshooting.

well_rested_buff.name: 08 Caves & Nesting - Well Rested Buff
well_rested_buff.info: Enable or disable the home-cave well rested buff.

edit_abilities_in_home_caves.name: 08 Caves & Nesting - Edit Abilities In Home Caves
edit_abilities_in_home_caves.info: Require ability edits to happen in home caves when enabled.

edit_abilities_while_sleeping.name: 08 Caves & Nesting - Edit Abilities While Sleeping
edit_abilities_while_sleeping.info: Require sleeping for ability edits when enabled.

hatchling_cave_exit_growth.name: 08 Caves & Nesting - Hatchling Cave Exit Growth

hunger_thirst_in_caves.name: 08 Caves & Nesting - Hunger/Thirst In Caves
hunger_thirst_in_caves.info: Allow hunger and thirst drain inside caves.

override_homecave_camping_distance.name: 08 Caves & Nesting - Override Homecave Camping Distance

override_homecave_camping_delay.name: 08 Caves & Nesting - Override Homecave Camping Delay

homecave_camping_delay.name: 08 Caves & Nesting - Homecave Camping Delay Seconds

same_species_adoption_restriction.name: 08 Caves & Nesting - Same Species Adoption Restriction
same_species_adoption_restriction.info: Restrict adoption to same species when enabled.

spawn_parent_nest_on_login.name: 08 Caves & Nesting - Spawn Parent Nest On Login
spawn_parent_nest_on_login.info: Spawn parent nest on login when enabled.

edit_abilities_at_nest.name: 08 Caves & Nesting - Edit Abilities At Nest

waystone_cooldown_removal.name: 09 World Systems - Waystone Cooldown Removal
waystone_cooldown_removal.info: Allow marks to remove waystone cooldowns.

waystone_cooldown_override.name: 09 World Systems - Waystone Cooldown Override
waystone_cooldown_override.info: Override waystone cooldown in seconds. -1 uses default.

override_trophy_quest_cooldown.name: 09 World Systems - Override Trophy Quest Cooldown

trophy_quest_cooldown.name: 09 World Systems - Trophy Quest Cooldown Seconds

min_time_between_exploration_quest.name: 09 World Systems - Min Time Between Exploration Quest

override_max_complete_quests.name: 09 World Systems - Override Max Complete Quests In Location

max_complete_quests_in_location.name: 09 World Systems - Max Complete Quests In Location
max_complete_quests_in_location.info: Quests required within a POI before it is completed.

ansel_camera_constraint_distance.name: 09 World Systems - Ansel Camera Constraint Distance

rcon_log_commands.name: 10 RCON - Log RCON Commands
rcon_log_commands.info: Enable RCON command logging in the server log.

rcon_max_failed_attempts.name: 10 RCON - Max Failed Attempts
rcon_max_failed_attempts.info: Failed login attempts before an IP is banned by SourceRCON.

rcon_timeout.name: 10 RCON - Timeout Seconds
rcon_timeout.info: Seconds before idle RCON connection is closed.

rcon_page_timeout.name: 10 RCON - Page Timeout Seconds
rcon_page_timeout.info: Seconds before paged RCON responses are removed.

rcon_max_connections_per_ip.name: 10 RCON - Max Connections Per IP
rcon_max_connections_per_ip.info: Maximum simultaneous RCON connections per IP.

rcon_ip_allowlist_a.name: 10 RCON - IP Allowlist A
rcon_ip_allowlist_a.info: Optional SourceRCON IPAllowList entry. Leave blank unless restricting RCON access.

rcon_ip_allowlist_b.name: 10 RCON - IP Allowlist B
rcon_ip_allowlist_b.info: Optional second SourceRCON IPAllowList entry. Leave blank unless restricting RCON access.

allowed_character_a.name: 11 Advanced Lists - Allowed Character A
allowed_character_a.info: Optional AllowedCharacters line value. Leave blank unless using character allowlists.

disallowed_character_a.name: 11 Advanced Lists - Disallowed Character A
disallowed_character_a.info: Optional DisallowedCharacters line value. Leave blank unless using character blocklists.

allowed_critter_a.name: 11 Advanced Lists - Allowed Critter A
allowed_critter_a.info: Optional AllowedCritters line value. Leave blank unless using critter allowlists.

disallowed_critter_a.name: 11 Advanced Lists - Disallowed Critter A
disallowed_critter_a.info: Optional DisallowedCritters line value. Leave blank unless using critter blocklists.

default_creator_mode_save.name: 11 Advanced Lists - Default Creator Mode Save
default_creator_mode_save.info: Name of the creator mode save file to load at startup. Leave blank if unused.
